_note: JANKUTrainedChenkinNoobai_v777 is a NoobAI-family anime checkpoint. It speaks the BOORU register: quality tags (masterpiece / best quality / newest / very aesthetic / absurdres) and FLAT anime coloring (cel shading, flat color, clean line art, vibrant palette). Sampler unchanged (euler_ancestral / normal / 26 / cfg~5.2); checkpoint/LoRA are the owner's kitchen call.
_defect_history: v3 (CLI-draft styleVocab: 'natural balanced color palette, full tonal range, soft ambient lighting, even gentle light, atmospheric depth') was a PAINTERLY/realism guess that failed the owner's eye TWICE — it read as western-comic plus a single-color monochrome wash (red, then gold/yellow). That vocab is removed entirely. v4 speaks JANKU's native anime dialect and kills the flat single-color BACKGROUND field (the wash's visible face) with a soft-gradient portrait backdrop + explicit background negatives.
quality: masterpiece, best quality, newest, very aesthetic, absurdres, highres
_weighting_note: Weighted (anime:1.3) + hard (realistic:1.4)/(3d:1.3) negatives were TESTED (2026-07-19) and COLLAPSED JANKU back into a red-monochrome wash — the exact rejected failure. Heavy weights are poison on this checkpoint (matches the earlier 1.5-1.6 negative collapse). Unweighted, natural-language anime vocab is the ceiling of prompt work; the flat bright style-card register for an ADULT MALE needs a kitchen LoRA/settings call, not more prompt weight.
styleVocab: anime coloring, cel shading, flat color, clean line art, crisp lineart, vibrant color palette, sharp focus, 2d
